news.title: Chef van bekende sterrenzaak Kommilfoo kondigt sluiting aan: “Even ademen na die sprint van bijna 30 jaar” - GVA
news.summary:
# Summary

Chef Bart Dierickx of the renowned Michelin-starred restaurant Kommilfoo has announced the restaurant's closure after nearly 30 years of operation, saying he needs a break after the long sprint. This is significant for food travelers visiting the city because Kommilfoo has been a celebrated fine dining destination, and its closure marks the end of an era for the local culinary scene.
